title: Devastating Dercksen cannot take Badgers over the line
description: CRICKET NEWS - A devastating batting display...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - A devastating batting display by Annerie Dercksen (125* from 105 balls; 6x6; 12x4) was not enough to take the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers Women over the line.


> Thanks to a Dercksen century, the Badgers posted 231/6 in their Hollywoodbets Pro 50 encounter against the DP World Lions in Oudtshoorn.


The Lions chased down the winning target, a record run chase of 232/8, with 10 balls to spare.

In the Pro20 match, the Lions (108/3) won by 7 wickets after they restricted the Badgers to 102/7.

The Badgers will travel to Cape Town this weekend where they will take on Western Province at Newlands on Saturday (Pro50) and Sunday (Pro20).

Summarised scorecards

Pro 50:

Garden Route Badgers 231/6 - 50 overs (Annerie Dercksen 125*, Nicolien Janse van Rensburg 32, Asakhe Nyovane 32, Raisibe Ntozakhe 2/21).

DP World Lions 232/8 - 48.2 overs (Nonkululeko Thabethe 77, Sinalo Jafta 45, Sunette Viljoen-Louw 24, Annerie Dercksen 3/50, Khayakazi Mathe 2/41).

Lions won by 2 wickets

Pro20

Garden Route Badgers 102/7 - 20 overs (Nadine Moodley 33, Jana Nell 21, Sharah Nettleton 2/20).

DP World Lions 108/3 - 16.2 overs (Tazmin Brits 36, Kirstie Thomson 34*).

Lions won by 7 wickets

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
